Attachment-III to Annexure 7.1
MINIMUM PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR
VARIOUS ACTIVITIES

breadcrumb: MINIMUM PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR VARIOUS ACTIVITIES > 1.0 OBJECTIVE:
text: 1.0 OBJECTIVE:

breadcrumb: MINIMUM PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR VARIOUS ACTIVITIES > 1.0 OBJECTIVE: > Attachment-III to Annexure 7.1
text:
To specify the minimum Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) required for various
activities and operations.

breadcrumb: MINIMUM PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR VARIOUS ACTIVITIES > 2.0 DESCRIPTION OF THE OBJECTIVE
text: 2.0 DESCRIPTION OF THE OBJECTIVE

breadcrumb: MINIMUM PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR VARIOUS ACTIVITIES > 2.0 DESCRIPTION OF THE OBJECTIVE > Attachment-III to Annexure 7.1
text:
• This SWP specifies the minimum PPE required for an activity or operation. The
minimum here means "at least". It does not mean that the minimum is enough by
default.
• Depending on the environmental conditions and circumstances of carrying out
that activity or operation, additional or modified PPE may be required to be used.
This assessment should be done through a "Job Hazard Analysis" prior to starting
the activity or the operation.
• The quality & specification of the PPE shall be as specified in SWP-01.

breadcrumb: MINIMUM PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR VARIOUS ACTIVITIES > 3.0 SCOPE:
text: 3.0 SCOPE:

breadcrumb: MINIMUM PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR VARIOUS ACTIVITIES > 3.0 SCOPE: > Attachment-III to Annexure 7.1
text:
a. This SWP is applicable to all the activities and operations carried out in
the premises of Visakh Refinery.
b. This SWP is limited to specifying the PPEs for the common activities.
c. For special activities which are not mentioned in this SWP, the PPE
requirement is to be developed during the Job hazard Analysis in
consultation with F&S.
d. This SWP does not provide all the precautions for the mentioned activities.
It only provides PPE required. For other precautions for an activity, refer
to the relevant Standing Instruction, Advisory, MSDS or the Operating
Manual.

breadcrumb: MINIMUM PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR VARIOUS ACTIVITIES > 4.0 DEFINITIONS
text: 4.0 DEFINITIONS

breadcrumb: MINIMUM PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR VARIOUS ACTIVITIES > 4.0 DEFINITIONS > Attachment-III to Annexure 7.1
text:
a. The phrases operation, maintenance are used in generic sense and there is no
reference to any specific department. No role definition is intended to be made in
this SWP from that perspective. At various times the activities could be performed
by different departments to a lower or higher extent depending on the
circumstances. Whosoever does that activity must use the required PPE.
b. Basic Minimum PPE (BM - PPE): In the refinery for entering any
Plant or carrying out any activity in the field, three minimum PPE are
required. These PPE are:
BM - PPEs
1. Safety Helmet
2. Safety Shoes
3. Hand Gloves with inner leather lining.
These PPE must be always used.

breadcrumb: MINIMUM PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR VARIOUS ACTIVITIES > 4.0 DEFINITIONS
text:
MINIMUM PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR
VARIOUS ACTIVITIES
c. Additional PPE (A - PPE): These are the PPEs which are to be used in
addition to the BMPPE based on the job, environment and circumstances.
d. Modified PPE (M - PPE): In activities where the BMPPE or APPE
quality, material or shape is to be of a different kind to suit the requirements
of that activity. This normally is a replacement of the corresponding PPE of
either BM-PPE or A-PPE.

breadcrumb: MINIMUM PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR VARIOUS ACTIVITIES > 5.0 RESPONSIBILITY:
text: 5.0 RESPONSIBILITY:

breadcrumb: MINIMUM PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT FOR VARIOUS ACTIVITIES > 5.0 RESPONSIBILITY:
text:
a. The responsibility of ensuring the usage of the adequate PPE lies with the
respective Department and the individual involved in the activity.
b. In case any activity is not covered in this SWP, the respective Division Head
should seek advice from F&S Department giving details of the specific
requirements.
